title: A successful society needs to believe in God

transcript.text: A successful society needs to believe in God.
A society filled with people who believe there's a purpose to our life
And that there is eternal life have hope and have goals
And have aspirations and work towards something.
A society of people who think we're here for no reason at all
Will not have goals, aspirations, or dreams, or work for anything.
I have met lots of people who are atheists and agnostics
Who are perfectly good people,
Very intelligent and contributing members of society.
I'm not talking about those people need to believe in God.
I mean, the society needs to believe in God.
They should believe in God to influence other people who don't believe in God
Who that belief causes them to not have any morals.
If a criminal believed in God, really believed in God,
And believed in a higher purpose in some divine creator
That invented us to be good and that we are good
And that original sin is completely bogus,
It's actually original beauty, original goodness.
Babies come out of the womb
As empty vessels that want to do good.
And children are happy, little, innocent, good people.
They're not evil people who need to have the evil beat out of them.
They're good people who need to have the good put into them.
And that's basically what atheism is,
Is believing that there's no good,
That we're just an accident,
That we're just some scientific result of billions of years of growth,
Of something that somehow brought life,
And then it just comes and just stumbles all over each other.
And here we are.
That doesn't make any sense.
This world is way too beautiful,
And there's way too many possibilities
For all of this to be some accident.
There is definitely a creator
And definitely a purpose to our life.
And if everybody believed in God
And everybody tried to convince
Other people to believe in God,
And then there would be less people
Who don't believe in God,
Who have no purpose
And don't believe.
That's what criminals do.
That's what criminals are.
Criminals are people who don't believe.
I know the mafia, they're Catholics,
And they go to church and stuff,
But I don't think that's real belief in God.
That's more like fear of the devil.
Maybe they believe that if they give money to the church,
Then they get to go to heaven.
It's kind of like the belief we've had
Sitting back in the good old days
When we paid the Pope all this money
To build St. Peter's
So that we could go to heaven when we die
Or something like this allegiance
Or some kind of way to atone for their sins
By giving them to the church.
But most, I think, if not all,
Criminals and people who aren't good
Contributors to society
Just don't believe in the fact
That we have eternal life
And everything in this world is created
To grow and to be beautiful.
So, we all should not be atheists
Or agnostics.
We should believe in God.
So, what is God?
Well, I think that God is all,
Is everything,
And it's that which connects everything.
If you believe that you are the same
As another human being,
If there's one part of you
That's the same as another human being,
That would be the God particle in you.
So, like, say,
We all, there's a part in us
That is part of us,
You can't take it away
Because it is part of us
That came away
From the central part of God,
Started here very primitively
And then grew up over time
And as an individual,
And here we are.
But, we do have that part
That's part of God,
And if that's part of God,
It's actually part of the other person.
So, other people are part of you,
And if you believe that,
Then you would have to,
Logic would tell you
That if you hurt another person,
You're hurting a part of yourself.
So, that kind of God
We should believe in.
As far as who is God,
Personally, my personal opinion is,
As everything has a center,
Why not existence?
Maybe somewhere out in the universe
There's a central black hole
And that would be God.
But, I don't think about that much.
I think of God more as
The blueprint of everything
That is self-aware.
If we're self-aware,
That older than us
Would have to be self-aware also.
I think the earth is self-aware.
It is alive.
So, believe in God.
